title: Record: Chimera TTT — K-Projection LoRA + Min-NLL (0.5601 BPB, 3-seed mean)
author: teddyoweh

data.description: Adds LoRA adapters to key projections in attention, in addition to the usual Q/V LoRA, with a reduced learning-rate multiplier.

novel_contributions: Adds LoRA adapters to K projections during test-time training, not just Q and V.
Tracks the minimum average NLL per document across TTT epochs instead of using only the last epoch.
Extends TTT from 6 to 8 epochs while avoiding late-epoch overfitting via min-NLL selection.
Uses a conservative 0.3x learning-rate multiplier for K-projection LoRA.
